channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Modèles d’IA hors ligne | Statu quo entre Anthropic et l’administration Trump après une rencontre à Washington
item.description: La start-up américaine d’intelligence artificielle (IA) Anthropic a rencontré lundi de hauts responsables de l’administration Trump sans obtenir le rétablissement de ses modèles les plus puissants, un porte-parole de l’entreprise assurant que les « parties travaillent rapidement à résoudre la situation ».

item.title: Hurdle hints and answers for June 16, 2026
item.description: Hints and answers to today's Hurdle all in one place.

item.title: Pick up a new language — or 25 — with this $127 Rosetta Stone deal
item.description: Learn up to 25 languages in a year with this one-year subscription to Rosetta Stone Sapphire, now just $127.20.

item.title: Stock up for the summer with this $15 BJ’s membership
item.description: Get a 1-year BJ’s Club Card Membership with Easy Renewal for just $15 and unlock access to bulk savings, top brands, fresh groceries, gas stations, and summer-ready essentials.

item.title: Stop copy-pasting prompts across GPT-4o, Claude, and Gemini — this tool combines them for a one-time $55
item.description: Compare outputs from GPT-4o, Claude Sonnet, Gemini, DeepSeek, Llama, and more with ChatPlayground AI’s lifetime plan for side-by-side AI testing and prompt optimization.

item.title: How to watch Iraq vs. Norway online for free
item.description: How to watch World Cup for free. Live stream Iraq vs. Norway in the 2026 FIFA World Cup for free from anywhere in the world.

item.title: How to unblock Pornhub for free in Australia
item.description: How to unblock porn for free in Australia. Unblock and watch Pornhub for free from anywhere in the world.

item.title: FBI gives first peek inside 22,000-square-foot town it’s built for digital crime training — the ‘one of a kind’ facility has a gas station, houses, and a data center with 200 hackable servers
item.description: The FBI has built a town with homes, businesses and hackable servers to help train its cyber agents.

item.title: DOJ Lawyers Argue xAI Is ‘Vital’ for National Security in NAACP Lawsuit
item.description: In a bid to dismiss a lawsuit over xAI’s polluting gas turbines, the Justice Department claimed the company is integral to military operations—including the Iran War.

item.title: Inside the fight over Claude Mythos 5
item.description: As the rest of the country celebrated the USA's first World Cup win and the New York Knicks championship, Anthropic spent its weekend fighting the Trump administration over its latest model release. At 5:21 PM on Friday, the company received a US export control directive to suspend access to its Mythos 5 and Fable 5 […]
